title: SQLancer TLP query with wrong results 3
poc: SELECT t0.c0 FROM t0 WHERE ((0.9952398693354088) IN (t0.c1, t0.c1)) IS NULL;
key_bug_features: Incorrect handling of IN clause with NULL results
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE "sys"."t1" ("id" INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, "value" DOUBLE, "status" BOOLEAN);
SELECT t1.id FROM "sys"."t1" WHERE (0.5 IN (t1.value, NULL)) IS NULL;
SELECT t1.id FROM "sys"."t1" WHERE (0.5 IN (SELECT t1.value FROM "sys"."t1" WHERE t1.status = TRUE)) IS NULL;
